zh.lifeSummary: Margaret於1559年出生在英國英格蘭。她和Stephen Peart至少有4個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1669年4月26日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾阿爾斯同享年110歲。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: Margaret was born in 1559, in England, United Kingdom. She had at least 4 sons and 3 daughters with Stephen Peart. She died on 26 April 1669, in Alstone, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 110.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret est née en 1559, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles avec Stephen Peart. Elle est décédée le 26 avril 1669, à Alstone, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 110 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret wurde 1559 in England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hatte mit Stephen Peart mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. April 1669 im Alter von 110 Jahren in Alstone, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret è nata il nel 1559 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie con Stephen Peart. Morì il 26 aprile 1669, nel Alstone, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 110 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaretは1559年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた。彼女はStephen Peartとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1669年4月26日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアアルストーンで110歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret(은)는 1559년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Stephen Peart(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1669년 4월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 알스톤에서 110세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margaret nasceu em 1559, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas com Stephen Peart. Ela faleceu em 26 de abril de 1669, em Alstone, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 110 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret родилась в 1559 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери от Stephen Peart. Она умерла 26 апреля 1669 г. в местности алстоун, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 110 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Margaret nació en 1559, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas con Stephen Peart. Murió el 26 de abril de 1669, en Alstone, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 110 años.
